gt_provenance.details: plaintext rows from cached capture-28a0ee6c41330ee3.pt; target real_h=Hs[:n_real], self-consistent with GELO input; no attack-derived GT

score_normalization.details: matched random-orthogonal-demix floor (same whitening, random rotation); genuine margin = jade - floor; raw p95 Hungarian |cosine|, no self-max normalization

result_existence.details: every number in RESULTS.md/analysis.json traces to sweep.json/sanity.json; no phantom results

probe_not_attack.details: negentropy probe imports _whiten/_subsample but NOT _joint_diag; computable with attack deleted; feature-Gram metric geometry-only

identity_authenticity.details: make_mixing returns orthogonal A at kappa=1, SVD-controlled cond otherwise; sanity uses real np.linalg.solve un-mix; not a no-op

ridge_anchor.details: _ridge_anchor fits W on obs[:n_tr], evaluates on disjoint obs[n_tr:] (n=20 held-out); failure expected by design under fresh-per-prompt A

scope.details: 3 layers x 5 kappa x 3 shield = 45 cells, 48 prompts, max_dim 32, seed 0 (single seed). RESULTS.md reports scope+partial verdict honestly. WARN: EXPERIMENT_PLAN listed jd/gram_error/shared_spectral probes not actually run; 'JADE/JD' wording tightened to 'JADE (joint-diag)'.

claims.impact: supported (scoped: tested JADE attack, single seed)
